items.title: Gemini 3.5: Frontier Intelligence with Action
items.summary: Google announces Gemini 3.5, a new iteration of its AI model, emphasizing enhanced frontier intelligence and improved capabilities for taking action, suggesting significant advancements in agentic AI.

items.title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills
items.summary: This paper introduces SkillOpt, a novel framework enabling AI agents to autonomously evolve and optimize their skills through an executive strategy, significantly enhancing their adaptability and performance.

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL Announce Strategic Content Partnership
items.summary: OpenAI has formed a strategic partnership with major Brazilian media groups, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL, to license their content for training AI models and integrating AI into their platforms.

items.title: Rethinking Cross-Layer Information Routing in Diffusion Transformers
items.summary: Researchers propose new methods for cross-layer information routing within Diffusion Transformers, aiming to improve the efficiency and quality of generative models.

items.title: Lens: Rethinking Training Efficiency for Foundational Text-to-Image Models
items.summary: A new approach called Lens is introduced to significantly enhance the training efficiency of foundational text-to-image models, potentially reducing computational costs and time.

items.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
items.summary: An analysis suggests that Pope Leo XIV's encyclical, 'Magnifica Humanitas,' while ostensibly about AI, primarily addresses broader themes of human dignity, ethics, and societal values in the digital age.

items.title: RMA: an Agentic System for Research-Level Mathematical Problems
items.summary: A new agentic system, RMA, is introduced, demonstrating capabilities in tackling complex, research-level mathematical problems, pushing the boundaries of AI in symbolic reasoning.

items.title: An npm Package for AI Agent Orchestration Just Shipped With Its Front Door Unlocked. Here's What the CVE Actually Reveals.
items.summary: A critical security vulnerability (CVE) has been discovered in a newly released npm package for AI agent orchestration, highlighting significant security risks in emerging AI development tools.

items.title: SciAtlas: A Large-Scale Knowledge Graph for Automated Scientific Research
items.summary: SciAtlas presents a large-scale knowledge graph designed to automate and accelerate scientific research by providing structured access to vast amounts of scientific information.

items.title: Why AI-Generated Code Is Always Good Enough — And Never Great
items.summary: This article explores the current limitations of AI-generated code, arguing that while it can produce functional solutions, it often lacks the nuanced quality and innovative spark of human-written code.

items.title: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work
items.summary: ClickUp's recent mass layoffs are analyzed for insights into the evolving landscape of work, particularly concerning the impact of AI and automation on job roles and company structures.

items.title: Why does AI forget what you said (and how to fix it)
items.summary: This article delves into the common problem of AI models losing conversational context and offers practical solutions to improve their memory and coherence in interactions.

items.title: PiD: Fast and High-Resolution Latent Decoding with Pixel Diffusion
items.summary: PiD proposes a novel method for fast and high-resolution latent decoding using pixel diffusion, enhancing the quality and speed of image generation in diffusion models.

items.title: PhotoFlow: Agentic 3D Virtual Photography Missions
items.summary: PhotoFlow introduces an agentic system capable of executing complex 3D virtual photography missions, allowing AI to autonomously compose and capture images within virtual environments.

items.title: Don’t let AI break your collective thinking: a practical guide for engineering teams
items.summary: A practical guide offers strategies for engineering teams to integrate AI tools without undermining collaborative problem-solving and critical thinking processes.
